recommendations.title: Trading Paint
recommendations.overview: A stock car racing legend is drawn back to the dirt track when his son, an aspiring driver, joins a rival racing team.

recommendations.title: Miss Bala
recommendations.overview: The story of a young woman clinging on to her dream to become a beauty contest queen in a Mexico dominated by organized crime.

recommendations.title: Mobsters
recommendations.overview: The story of a group of friends in turn of the century New York, from their early days as street hoods to their rise in the world of organized crime...

recommendations.title: Zombie Hunter
recommendations.overview: When a street drug turns junkies into an army of zombies, a man named Hunter finds himself with nothing but a beat-up car and a trunk full of guns and booze, until he stumbles across a small band of survivors.

recommendations.title: Born to Race: Fast Track
recommendations.overview: Danny Krueger is a twenty-year old drag racer who plays by his own rules. After winning a scholarship to the prestigious Fast Lane Racing Academy, Danny finds himself competing against some of the fiercest young drivers in the world. Tension soars on

recommendations.title: Ultras
recommendations.overview: An aging soccer fanatic faces down the reality of his past while struggling to give himself and a young follower very different futures.

recommendations.title: Death Proof
recommendations.overview: Austin's hottest DJ, Jungle Julia, sets out into the night to unwind with her two friends Shanna and Arlene. Covertly tracking their moves is Stuntman Mike, a scarred rebel leering from behind the wheel of his muscle car, revving just feet away.

recommendations.title: Christine
recommendations.overview: Nerdy high schooler Arnie Cunningham falls for Christine, a rusty 1958 Plymouth Fury, and becomes obsessed with restoring the classic automobile to her former glory. As the car changes, so does Arnie, whose newfound confidence turns to arrogance behi

recommendations.title: Pushpa: The Rise
recommendations.overview: As Pushpa, a labourer, rises in the world of red sandalwood smuggling, he ends up making many enemies. However, violence ensues when the police try to topple his illegal business.

recommendations.title: Lowriders
recommendations.overview: A young street artist in East Los Angeles is caught between his father's obsession with lowrider car culture, his ex-felon brother and his need for self-expression.
